pi_items.source: Found hardcoded in export_result.sh and task.json description
Explicitly requested in task.json description and checked logically in export_result.sh

privileged_info_summary: The input file 'hst_wfpc2_sample.fits' is a real FITS image downloaded from NASA GSFC (WFPC2u5780205r_c0fx.fits). It has dimensions (4, 200, 200) and max pixel value ~3740. The task requires saving the output to '/home/ga/AstroImages/masking/source_mask.fits' and performing exactly 3 dilations on the binary mask, as checked implicitly by ensuring the output area increases by at least 10% compared to a baseline 99th percentile threshold area.
